narrative: Dear [Student's Name], imagine the admissions team looking at your application not just as a collection of numbers, but as the opening chapters of your story as a future lawyer—and unfortunately, the patterns they saw echoed too many tales that didn't end with passing the bar exam. Your Year 1 decile of 3 wasn't much stronger, painting a picture of early struggles that carried forward rather than fading away. Your Asian background, while a source of strength in so many ways, aligned in the data with profiles that faced steeper odds in this high-stakes arena.
